home.descripcion: Specialized in modern architectures, expressive interfaces, and scalable code. From idea to deploy.
home.desc_sobre_mi: I am a fullstack developer with experience building complete web products. I am driven to solve real problems with clean and well-thought-out technology. I am comfortable working on both backend and frontend, and I especially enjoy the intersection between the two: API architecture, performance, and UX.
home.desc_junior: Development of modules in Odoo, REST APIs with Spring Boot, and Angular dashboards. Maintenance and integration with PostgreSQL.
home.desc_practicas: Creation of the KultuX app (Flutter + Spring Boot + PostgreSQL). Architecture design and first public version.
home.desc_cfgs: Specialization in mobile, web, and desktop development. Final project KultuX, awarded best project of the class.
home.desc_cfgm: Fundamentals of networks, systems administration, and first steps in programming.
